_comment: Cohere ASR per-tensor tolerances for compare_tensors.py.
CohereAsrForConditionalGeneration) running bf16 inference on CPU.
C++: ggml CPU compute, weights stored as bf16 in GGUF.
Encoder: the subsampling conv (pre_encode) shows max_abs ~9 at
frame 137 (last frame, padding boundary artifact). Interior
frames are ~0.22 max_abs. The errors attenuate through the
0.20. Root cause is bf16 accumulation order differences between
ggml im2col and PyTorch native conv.
Decoder: per-layer max_abs grows through layers (block values
are large, ~1e3, so relative error is small) then the final
log(softmax(x)) produces -inf at different positions when
weights differ slightly. Use dec.logits_raw (pre-softmax) for
Remaining mel diff (~0.27 max_abs) is from dither: Transformers
applies dither=1e-5 unconditionally, C++ does not.
